nasb.text: The Lord said to Satan, “From where do you come?” Then Satan answered the Lord and said, “From roaming about on the earth and walking around on it.”

esv.text: The Lord said to Satan, “From where have you come?” Satan answered the Lord and said, “From going to and fro on the earth, and from walking up and down on it.”

cnv.text: 耶和華問撒但：“你從哪裡來？”撒但回答耶和華說：“我在地上徘徊，走來走去。”

ccb.text: 耶和华问撒旦：“你从哪里来？”撒旦答道：“我在地上到处游走。”
